selectTenant.title: Select Your Tenant
selectTenant.description: Choose the tenant profile you want to use for this session. Bills, visitors and support requests will follow the selected unit.
selectTenant.emptyDescription: Register your first tenant profile to continue into the resident portal.

registerTenant.title: Register Tenant
registerTenant.description: Verify the resident code, confirm the unit details, then upload the required documents.
registerTenant.summaryDescription: Your tenant profile scopes resident features like billing, visitor passes and support history.

steps.label: Resident Code
steps.title: Scan QR or enter resident code
steps.description: Use the QR invitation from management or type the resident code manually to start verification.

steps.label: Unit Details
steps.title: Confirm unit details
steps.description: Check the property, unit and resident information before proceeding.

steps.label: Documents
steps.title: Upload supporting documents
steps.description: Attach the resident documents required for validation.

documents.label: Required Documents
documents.title: Required upload checklist
documents.description: Upload each required document before submitting the tenant registration.
documents.helperDescription: Make sure the files are clear and complete. Each required row should have a file attached.

requiredList.label: Supporting Proof
requiredList.description: Utility bill, company letter or other proof
